name: Celsius to Fahrenheit Converter
description: Industrial-grade temperature conversion tool with precision validation, confidence adjustment, and actionable insights for process control and quality management.

inputs.label: Temperature in Celsius
inputs.businessContext: Process temperature reading from sensor or manual measurement. Must be above absolute zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: Process temperature reading from sensor or manual measurement. Must be above absolute zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sensörden veya manuel ölçümden alınan proses sıcaklığı okuması. Mutlak sıfırın üzerinde olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozesstemperaturmessung vom Sensor oder manuell. Muss über dem absoluten Nullpunkt liegen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Lecture de température du capteur ou mesure manuelle. Doit être supérieure au zéro absolu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Lectura de temperatura del proceso, desde sensor o medición manual. Debe estar por encima del cero absoluto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قراءة درجة حرارة العملية من المستشعر أو القياس اليدوي. يجب أن تكون أعلى من الصفر المطلق

inputs.label: Sensor Accuracy (±°C)
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer-specified accuracy of the temperature sensor (ISO 17025 calibration standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturer-specified accuracy of the temperature sensor (ISO 17025 calibration standard).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıcaklık sensörünün üretici tarafından belirtilen doğruluğu (ISO 17025 kalibrasyon standardı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Hersteller angegebene Genauigkeit des Temperatursensors (ISO 17025 Kalibrierstandard).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Précision spécifiée par le fabricant du capteur de température (norme d'étalonnage ISO 17025).
businessContext_i18n.es: Precisión especificada por el fabricante del sensor de temperatura (estándar de calibración ISO 17025).
businessContext_i18n.ar: دقة المستشعر المحددة من الشركة المصنعة (معيار معايرة ISO 17025)

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: Field calibration adjustment to align sensor with reference standard (NIST traceable).

businessContext_i18n.en: Field calibration adjustment to align sensor with reference standard (NIST traceable).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sensörü referans standarda (NIST izlenebilir) hizalamak için saha kalibrasyon ayarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feldkalibrierungsanpassung zur Angleichung des Sensors an den Referenzstandard (NIST-rückführbar).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement d'étalonnage sur site pour aligner le capteur sur un étalon de référence (traçable NIST).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste de calibración en campo para alinear el sensor con el estándar de referencia (trazable NIST).
businessContext_i18n.ar: ضبط المعايرة الميدانية لمحاذاة المستشعر مع المعيار المرجعي (متتبع لـ NIST)

inputs.label: Target Unit System
inputs.businessContext: Select output temperature scale for downstream process or reporting (ISO 80000-5).

businessContext_i18n.en: Select output temperature scale for downstream process or reporting (ISO 80000-5).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt süreç veya raporlama için çıktı sıcaklık ölçeğini seçin (ISO 80000-5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Ausgabe-Temperaturskala für nachgelagerte Prozesse oder Berichterstattung (ISO 80000-5).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez l'échelle de température de sortie pour le processus aval ou le rapport (ISO 80000-5).
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione la escala de temperatura de salida para el proceso posterior o informe (ISO 80000-5).
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختيار مقياس درجة الحرارة الناتج للعملية النهائية أو التقارير (ISO 80000-5)

inputs.label: Enable Process Alerts
inputs.businessContext: Toggle threshold-based alerts for out-of-spec temperature conditions (Six Sigma control limits).

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle threshold-based alerts for out-of-spec temperature conditions (Six Sigma control limits).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Spesifikasyon dışı sıcaklık koşulları için eşik tabanlı uyarıları aç/kapat (Altı Sigma kontrol limitleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Schwellenwertbasierte Alarme für außerspezifikationstemperaturbedingungen umschalten (Six Sigma-Regelgrenzen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Activer les alertes basées sur des seuils pour les conditions de température hors spécifications (limites de contrôle Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Activar alertas basadas en umbral para condiciones de temperatura fuera de especificación (límites de control Seis Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تبديل التنبيهات المستندة إلى الحدود لظروف درجة حرارة خارج المواصفات (حدود التحكم في سته سيجما)

rules.message: Temperature cannot be below absolute zero (-273.15°C).
Sensor accuracy must be between 0.01 and 10 °C (ISO 17025).
Calibration offset exceeds ±5°C. Recalibrate sensor per ISO 9001.

thresholds.message: Temperature exceeds 100°C — risk of steam generation or material degradation.
thresholds.action: Inspect cooling system and verify process limits.

thresholds.message: Temperature below -40°C — potential for brittle fracture in materials (ASTM E23).
Sensor accuracy > 2°C — measurement uncertainty exceeds acceptable tolerance (Six Sigma ±3σ).

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
